\tzpentry{ID3798}{Kinetic Term Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3798 introduces Kinetic Term Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{ij} = \frac{K_0}{N}\, \frac{\exp\!\big(-|r_i-r_j|/L\big)}{|r_i-r_j|+\varepsilon}, \qquad K_{J,i}\propto \frac{1}{\big(|r_i-r_J|+\varepsilon\big)^3}. \label{eq:belt_couplings} \end{equation}
